Some cars get you to your destination. Others make a statement before you even arrive. ✨

Experience the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and prestige with our Bentley and Maybach collection.

Whether it’s a wedding, corporate event, special occasion, airport transfer, or simply a day of travelling in style, we’ve got the perfect ride for you.

RNN Motors — where luxury meets the road

Meet the 2019 Bentley Bentayga ✨

Where luxury meets performance.

Designed for those who appreciate elegance, comfort, and a commanding presence on the road, the Bentayga delivers an experience that goes far beyond driving.

Let us show you the value for your money.

This week’s luxury spotlight ✨

Meet the 2019 Bentley Bentayga — where performance meets uncompromising luxury.

🔹 6.0L Twin-Turbo W12 Engine
🔹 542 Horsepower
🔹 All-Wheel Drive (AWD)
🔹 8-Speed Automatic Transmission

🔹 Advanced Air Suspension
🔹 Premium Comfort & Technology Package
🔹 Iconic Bentley Presence

Built for those who appreciate refinement without sacrificing performance, the Bentayga delivers a driving experience few SUVs can match. (Cars.com)

💰 Price: KSh 28.9 Million

Need it for a special occasion? This vehicle is also available for hire.

Visit RNN Motors and let us show you the value for your money.

ntroducing: Cars of the Week.

From price, model, specs, features, and performance — to showing you exactly what makes each car worth the drive 👀

Whether you’re buying, browsing, or simply love cars — this series is for you.

Follow along and discover your next favourite ride.

From the laughter, the smiles, the relaxing moments and beautiful memories shared, mother's day was nothing short of magical. Seeing a family come together to celebrate the women who mean the world to them was the highlight of it all 🤍

#MothersDay #ThankYouMoms #WaterfrontJuja #Rnnmotors #gretretrogrooming

This Mother’s Day, we’re celebrating her with an experience she’ll never forget ✨

Win a luxury day out including:
🚗 A chauffeured ride from @rnn_motors

1. Follow all 4 pages:
 @rnn_motors

2. Like this post ❤️

3. Comment below telling us why your mum (or someone special) deserves this experience 💐

4. Get as many likes on your comment as possible —
 the comment with the most likes wins 🏆

5. Share this post & tag us to boost your chances

#rnnmotors

BMW 740d – Executive Luxury Redefined

Now available at R.N.N Motor Dealership.

Experience the perfect balance of performance, refinement, and intelligent engineering with the BMW 740d. Powered by a 3.0L TwinPower Turbo diesel engine, this luxury sedan delivers impressive torque, smooth acceleration, and outstanding fuel efficiency — all while maintaining the prestige expected from BMW’s flagship 7 Series.

✨ Features include:
✔️ Premium leather interior
✔️ Advanced digital cockpit & infotainment system
✔️ Ambient interior lighting
✔️ Executive rear-seat comfort
✔️ Intelligent driver assistance systems
✔️ Smooth automatic transmission
✔️ Superior ride comfort and stability

The BMW 740d isn’t just a car — it’s a statement of success, sophistication, and smart investment.

Visit R.N.N Motor Dealership today and elevate your driving experience.

📞 Contact us now to book a viewing or test drive.

Pure British charm on Kenyan plates 🇬🇧🇰🇪✨
Timeless curves, chrome for days, and that sunshine yellow doing all the talking. This classic MG isn’t chasing trends — it is the moment. From the grille to the stance, this is what driving used to feel like: raw, elegant, and full of soul.

Old school hits different. 💛
Would you cruise or would you restore it even more?

#ClassicCars #MGClassic #VintageVibes #BritishClassic #CarCultureKE

The RANGE ROVER VOGUE’S more stylish cousin😍😍🤩🔥

2024 RANGE ROVER SPORT P400 Autobiography 

📥📨Call for INQUIRIES

Plenty of cars for everyone 😍😍

📥📨DM or CALL for inquiries
We will always find the right car for you!!! ✅✅💯📩📩

2022 Ford Raptor

✅ Engine: 3.5L EcoBoost Twin-Turbo V6
✅ Power: 450 hp
✅ Torque: 691 Nm
✅ Transmission: 10-speed automatic
✅ Drivetrain: 4WD
✅ 0–100 km/h: ~5.5 seconds
✅ Suspension: FOX Live Valve 3.1 shocks
✅ Towing Capacity: Up to 3,700 kg
✅ Ground Clearance: 13.1 inches (high-clearance setup)
✅ Wheels: 17-inch with 35” or optional 37” tires
✅ Fuel Consumption: Approx. 6–7 km/l

Aston Martin DBX

✅ 4.0L Twin-Turbo V8
✅ 542 hp
✅ 0–100 km/h in 4.5s
✅ AWD Luxury SUV
✅ Pure Aston Martin elegance

Did you know? The Citroën DS 23 was so advanced for its time that it had self-leveling hydropneumatic suspension — the car literally adjusted its own height for a smoother ride. Comfort from another planet 🚀✨
ASTON MARTIN DBX😝😮‍💨🔥🥳

2014 Range Rover Vogue 4.4 SDV8

✅ Powerful 4.4L V8 Twin-Turbo Diesel Engine
✅ 8-Speed Automatic Transmission
✅ Luxurious Leather Interior
✅ Meridian Surround Sound System
✅ Panoramic Sunroof
✅ Adaptive Air Suspension
✅ 4-Wheel Drive with Terrain Response
✅ Premium LED Headlights
✅ Heated & Ventilated Seats

✨ Available for rental in Gold and Black — experience ultimate luxury and performance wherever you go. 🚘💨

2023 Land Rover Defender D250

✅ 3.0L 6-cyl Diesel, 249 hp
✅ 8-speed automatic transmission
✅ AWD with Terrain Response
✅ 0–100 km/h in ~8.0s
✅ Top speed 188 km/h
✅ Torque: 570 Nm
✅ 11.4-inch Pivi Pro infotainment
✅ 5 or 7 seat configuration
✅ Towing capacity up to 3,500 kg

Land Rover Defender D250 😮‍💨🔥🔥
NOW AVAILABLE ‼️‼️‼️
NEW 110 in the BUILDING😮‍💨😍😍

Mercedes-Maybach S580

✅ 4.0L V8 Biturbo with EQ Boost (Mild Hybrid)
✅ 496 hp & 700 Nm torque
✅ 9-speed automatic transmission
✅ 0–100 km/h in ~4.8 seconds
✅ Rear-wheel steering for better handling
✅ Executive rear seats with massage & recline
✅ Burmester 4D Surround Sound System
✅ Dual 11.6” rear entertainment displays
✅ Panoramic sunroof with ambient lighting
✨ “Luxury redefined. Power perfected. The Maybach S580 isn’t just a car, it’s an experience. 🚘💎

2016 Land Rover Discovery HSE

✅ 2.0L turbocharged petrol/diesel options (up to 240 hp)
✅ 9-speed automatic, AWD
✅ 0–100 km/h: ~8–8.5s
✅ Top speed: ~112–117 mph
✅ Fuel economy: ~44–53 mpg (diesel)
✅ 7 seats
✅ Length: ~4.8 m | Width: ~2.05 m | Height: ~1.88 m
✅ Wheelbase: ~2.89 m
✅ Towing capacity: 3500 kg (braked), 750 kg (unbraked)

Mercedes Benz GLE 63s

✅ 5.5L V8 Bi-Turbo engine
✅ 577 hp, 760 Nm torque
✅ 0–100 km/h in ~4.2s
✅ 7-speed AMG SPEEDSHIFT MCT
✅ 4MATIC all-wheel drive
✅ AMG-tuned air suspension
✅ Premium leather & carbon interior
✅ Advanced driver assistance systems

Cleanest and lowest mileage 2016 Land Cruiser V8

2023 Mercedes-AMG G63 

✅ Engine: 4.0L V8 Biturbo
✅ Horsepower: 577 hp
✅ Torque: 850 Nm
✅ 0–100 km/h: 4.5 seconds
✅ Transmission: 9-speed automatic
✅ Drivetrain: All-wheel drive (4MATIC)
✅ Top Speed: 220 km/h (250 km/h with AMG Driver’s Package)
✅ Fuel Consumption: ~13.1 L/100km
✅ Wheels: 22-inch AMG alloys (optional 23”)
✅ Interior: Nappa leather, dual 12.3” displays
✅ Suspension: AMG RIDE CONTROL adaptive damping
✅ Exhaust: AMG performance exhaust system
✅ Ground Clearance: 241 mm

Range Rover Vogue SV Long Wheelbase

⸻

✅ 4.4L Twin-Turbo V8 – 523 hp, 750 Nm, 0–100 km/h in 4.6s
✅ 8-speed automatic with AWD & Terrain Response 2
✅ Length: 5,252 mm | Wheelbase: 3,197 mm
✅ Executive rear seats with massage & recline
✅ 13.1” Pivi Pro + 13.7” digital cluster
✅ Meridian Signature Sound & rear entertainment
✅ Air suspension with predictive road scan
✅ 24-way heated/cooled/massage seats
✅ 725L boot space (up to 2,050L folded)
✅ Ultra-luxury interior with SV bespoke finishes

2025 GLE 450🔥🔥🔥
DM for enquiries

2022 Audi RS Q8

⸻

✅ Engine: 4.0L twin-turbocharged V8
✅ Horsepower: 591 hp
✅ Torque: 590 lb-ft (800 Nm)
✅ Transmission: 8-speed Tiptronic automatic
✅ Drivetrain: Quattro all-wheel drive
✅ 0–100 km/h (0–62 mph): 3.8 seconds
✅ Top Speed: 250 km/h (155 mph) electronically limited (up to 305 km/h / 190 mph with Dynamic Package)
✅ Fuel Economy (combined): Approx. 13.1 L/100 km (18 mpg US)
✅ Suspension: Adaptive air suspension with RS-specific tuning
✅ Brakes: RS steel brakes (optional carbon-ceramic)
✅ Wheels: 22-inch standard (23-inch optional)
✅ Interior: Valcona leather with RS honeycomb stitching
✅ Infotainment: MMI touch response with dual touchscreen (10.1” upper, 8.6” lower)
✅ Sound System: Bang & Olufsen 3D Premium Sound System
✅ Digital Cockpit: 12.3-inch Audi Virtual Cockpit
✅ Cargo Capacity: 605 L (21.4 cu ft) behind second row
✅ Towing Capacity: Up to 3,500 kg (7,716 lbs)
✅ Drive Modes: Audi Drive Select with RS-specific modes (RS1 & RS2)
✅ Exhaust: RS sport exhaust system (with optional black tips)
✅ Lighting: Matrix LED headlights with dynamic turn signals

New STOCK ALERT‼️‼️
🔥🔥😮‍💨

2022 Mercedes-Benz S-Class Diesel

⸻

✅ Engine: 3.0L Inline-6 Turbo Diesel
✅ Power Output: 330 hp
✅ Torque: 700 Nm
✅ Transmission: 9G-TRONIC 9-speed automatic
✅ Drivetrain: 4MATIC all-wheel drive
✅ 0–100 km/h: ~5.4 seconds
✅ Top Speed: 250 km/h (electronically limited)
✅ Fuel Consumption (combined): ~6.5 L/100km
✅ CO₂ Emissions: ~170 g/km

✅ Interior Features:
	•	MBUX infotainment system with OLED touchscreen
	•	Ambient lighting (64 colors)
	•	Burmester® 3D surround sound system
	•	Premium Nappa leather upholstery
	•	Active ambient lighting with climate integration

✅ Safety & Driver Assistance:
	•	Active Distance Assist DISTRONIC
	•	Active Lane Keeping Assist
	•	Pre-Safe® Impulse Side
	•	360° camera system
	•	Digital Light headlamps

✅ Dimensions:
	•	Length: 5,179 mm
	•	Width: 1,954 mm
	•	Height: 1,503 mm
	•	Wheelbase: 3,106 mm
	•	Boot Capacity: 550 L

✅ Wheels: 19”–21” alloy wheels (depending on trim)
